hero.headline: Predict. Stake. Earn.
hero.subheading: Decentralized prediction markets on Stellar. Fast, cheap, and transparent.

bettingSlip.title: Betting Slip
bettingSlip.noBets: No bets queued yet. Add bets from any market to batch them together.
bettingSlip.connectWalletPrompt: Connect your wallet to submit bets

notifications.title: Push Notifications
notifications.description: Get alerts for markets you've bet on (Proposed/Resolved).

insufficientGas.title: Insufficient Gas
insufficientGas.message: You don't have enough XLM to cover the transaction gas fees. The Stellar network requires a small amount of XLM for every operation.

transactionFailed.title: Transaction Failed
transactionFailed.message: The Ledger rejected this transaction. This could be due to slippage, network congestion, or an expired deadline.

walletDisconnected.title: Wallet Disconnected
walletDisconnected.message: Your connection to the Stellar network has been interrupted. Please reconnect your wallet to continue predicting.

marketPaused.title: Market Paused
marketPaused.message: This Market's circuit breaker has been triggered. Trading is temporarily suspended while our engineers recalibrate the sensors.

market.queueFull: Betting slip is full (max {{max}} bets). Remove one to add more.
